G4438.derivation: from a derivative of the same as G4435 (πυγμή);
G4438.strongs_def: to box (with the fist), i.e. contend (as a boxer) at the games (figuratively)

G4481.derivation: by incorrect transliteration for a word of Hebrew origin (H03594);

G4471.strongs_def: Rama (i.e. Ramah), a place in Palestine

G4485.strongs_def: something torn, i.e. a fragment (by implication and abstractly, a fall)

G4459.derivation: adverb from the base of G4226 (ποῦ);
G4459.strongs_def: an interrogative particle of manner; in what way? (sometimes the question is indirect, how?); also as exclamation, how much!

G4496.derivation: a primary verb (perhaps rather akin to the base of G4474 (ῥαπίζω), through the idea of sudden motion);
G4496.strongs_def: to fling (properly, with a quick toss, thus differing from G906 (βάλλω), which denotes a deliberate hurl; and from (see in G1614 (ἐκτείνω)), which indicates an extended projection); by qualification, to deposit (as if a load); by extension, to disperse

G4461.derivation: of Hebrew origin (H07227 with pronominal suffix);
G4461.strongs_def: my master, i.e Rabbi, as an official title of honor

G4409.strongs_def: to be first (in rank or influence)

G4488.derivation: probably of Hebrew origin (apparently for H07509);

G4412.derivation: neuter of G4413 (πρῶτος) as adverb (with or without G3588 (ὁ));
G4412.strongs_def: firstly (in time, place, order, or importance)
G4412.kjv_def: before, at the beginning, chiefly (at, at the) first (of all)

G4499.strongs_def: Rhodus, an island of the Mediterranean

G4454.strongs_def: a "foal" or "filly", i.e. (specially), a young ass

G4453.derivation: probably ultimately from (to be busy, to trade);
G4453.strongs_def: to barter (as a pedlar), i.e. to sell

G4413.strongs_def: foremost (in time, place, order or importance)
G4413.kjv_def: before, beginning, best, chief(-est), first (of all), former

G4400.derivation: middle voice from G4253 (πρό) and a derivative of G5495 (χείρ);
G4400.strongs_def: to handle for oneself in advance, i.e. (figuratively) to purpose

G4417.strongs_def: to trip, i.e. (figuratively) to err, sin, fail (of salvation)

G4476.strongs_def: perhaps rather akin to the base of G4474 (ῥαπίζω) through the idea of puncturing); a needle

G4455.strongs_def: at any time, i.e. (with negative particle) at no time
G4455.kjv_def: at any time, + never (…to any man), + yet, never man

G4407.strongs_def: pertaining to the dawn, i.e. matutinal

G4456.strongs_def: to petrify, i.e. (figuratively) to indurate (render stupid or callous)

G4493.strongs_def: a jerk (of the eye, i.e. (by analogy) an instant)

G4419.derivation: neuter of a presumed derivative of G4420 (πτέρυξ);

G4458.derivation: adverb from the base of G4225 (πού);
G4458.strongs_def: an enclitic particle of indefiniteness of manner; somehow or anyhow; used only in composition

G4434.strongs_def: akin to G4422 (πτοέω) and the alternate of G4098 (πίπτω)); a beggar (as cringing), i.e. pauper (strictly denoting absolute or public mendicancy, although also used in a qualified or relative sense; whereas G3993 (πένης) properly means only straitened circumstances in private), literally (often as noun) or figuratively (distressed)

G4448.strongs_def: to kindle, i.e. (passively) to be ignited, glow (literally), be refined (by implication), or (figuratively) to be inflamed (with anger, grief, lust)
G4448.kjv_def: burn, fiery, be on fire, try

G4467.derivation: from a comparative of (easy, i.e. reckless) and G2041 (ἔργον);
G4467.strongs_def: easy-going behavior, i.e. (by extension) a crime

G4451.strongs_def: ignition, i.e. (specially), smelting (figuratively, conflagration, calamity as a test)

G4410.strongs_def: a sitting first (in the front row), i.e. preeminence in council

G4475.kjv_def: (+ strike with the) palm of the hand, smite with the hand

G4416.derivation: from G4413 (πρῶτος) and the alternate of G5088 (τίκτω);
G4416.strongs_def: first-born (usually as noun, literally or figuratively)

G4469.strongs_def: O empty one, i.e. thou worthless (as a term of utter vilification)

G4489.strongs_def: a speaker, i.e. (by implication) a forensic advocate

G4435.derivation: from a primary (the fist as a weapon);
G4435.strongs_def: the clenched hand, i.e. (only in dative case as adverb) with the fist (hard scrubbing)

G4439.strongs_def: a gate, i.e. the leaf or wing of a folding entrance (literally or figuratively)

G4426.derivation: from a presumed derivative of G4429 (πτύω) (and thus akin to G4422 (πτοέω));

G4424.derivation: from (Ptolemy, after whom it was named);

G4430.strongs_def: a ruin, i.e. (specially), lifeless body (corpse, carrion)

G4465.strongs_def: a rod- (the Latin fasces) holder, i.e. a Roman lictor (constable or executioner)

G4463.strongs_def: to strike with a stick, i.e. bastinado

G4406.strongs_def: dawning, i.e. (by analogy) autumnal (showering, the first of the rainy season)

G4486.derivation: both prolonged forms of (which appears only in certain forms, and is itself probably a strengthened form of (see in G2608 (κατάγνυμι))) to "break," "wreck" or "crack", i.e. (especially) to sunder (by separation of the parts;
G4486.strongs_def: G2608 (κατάγνυμι) being its intensive (with the preposition in composition), and G2352 (θραύω) a shattering to minute fragments; but not a reduction to the constituent particles, like G3089 (λύω)) or disrupt, lacerate; by implication, to convulse (with spasms); figuratively, to give vent to joyful emotions

G4405.derivation: feminine of a derivative of G4404 (πρωΐ) as noun;

G4411.strongs_def: a reclining first (in the place of honor) at the dinner-bed, i.e. preeminence at meals

G4428.strongs_def: and thus apparently allied to G4072 (πέτομαι) through the idea of expansion, and to 4429 through that of flattening; compare G3961 (πατέω)); to fold, i.e. furl a scroll

G4480.strongs_def: a rheda, i.e. four-wheeled carriage (wagon for riding)

G4433.strongs_def: to be a beggar, i.e. (by implication) to become indigent (figuratively)

G4483.derivation: perhaps akin (or identical) with G4482 (ῥέω) (through the idea of pouring forth);
G4483.strongs_def: to utter, i.e. speak or say

G4436.derivation: from (the name of the region where Delphi, the seat of the famous oracle, was located);
G4436.strongs_def: a Python, i.e. (by analogy, with the supposed diviner there) inspiration (soothsaying)

G4479.strongs_def: Rebecca (i.e. Ribkah), the wife of Isaac

G4487.strongs_def: an utterance (individually, collectively or specially),; by implication, a matter or topic (especially of narration, command or dispute); with a negative naught whatever

G4452.derivation: another form of the base of G4458 (-πώς);
G4452.strongs_def: an enclitic particle of indefiniteness; yet, even; used only in the comparative. See G3369 (μηδέπω), G3380 (μήπω), G3764 (οὐδέπω), G3768 (οὔπω), G4455 (πώποτε).

G4414.strongs_def: one standing first in the ranks, i.e. a captain (champion)

G4408.derivation: feminine of a presumed derivative of G4253 (πρό) as noun;
G4408.strongs_def: the prow, i.e. forward part of a vessel

G4490.derivation: adverb from a derivative of G4483 (ῥέω);

G4420.derivation: from a derivative of G4072 (πέτομαι) (meaning a feather);

G4422.derivation: probably akin to the alternate of G4098 (πίπτω) (through the idea of causing to fall) or to G4072 (πέτομαι) (through that of causing to fly away);

G4446.strongs_def: inflamed, i.e. (by implication) feverish (as noun, fever)

G4404.strongs_def: at dawn; by implication, the day-break watch

G4474.derivation: from a derivative of a primary (to let fall, "rap");
G4474.kjv_def: smite (with the palm of the hand)

G4482.strongs_def: for some tenses of which a prolonged form is used to flow ("run"; as water)

G4464.strongs_def: a stick or wand (as a cudgel, a cane or a baton of royalty)

G4431.strongs_def: a crash, i.e. downfall (literally or figuratively)

G4472.strongs_def: to render besprinkled, i.e. asperse (ceremonially or figuratively)

G4437.strongs_def: clasped (thick), i.e. (figuratively) frequent; neuter plural (as adverb) frequently

G4440.strongs_def: a gate-way, door-way of a building or city; by implication, a portal or vestibule

G4402.strongs_def: before the dance; Prochorus, a Christian

G4441.derivation: middle voice prolonged from a primary (which occurs only as an alternate in certain tenses);
G4441.strongs_def: to question, i.e. ascertain by inquiry (as a matter of information merely; and thus differing from G2065 (ἐρωτάω), which properly means a request as a favor; and from G154 (αἰτέω), which is strictly a demand for something due; as well as from G2212 (ζητέω), which implies a search for something hidden; and from G1189 (δέομαι), which involves the idea of urgent need); by implication, to learn (by casual intelligence)

G4445.strongs_def: to be on fire, i.e. (specially), to have a fever

G4494.derivation: from a derivative of G4496 (ῥίπτω) (meaning a fan or bellows);
G4494.strongs_def: to breeze up, i.e. (by analogy) to agitate (into waves)
